nonBlockingIssues.description: getStatusBadgeColor() at line 263 uses old status values ('aktif', 'tidak_aktif', 'dalam_perawatan') but now receives status_tanaman values ('TM', 'TBM', 'TTM', 'TLS'). All status badges fall through to gray default styling instead of appropriate colors. This is a visual bug but does not block functionality.
Skill procedure specifies agent-browser UI verification for import, but worker did not perform interactive checks. Only typecheck/lint/build were verified.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that when STATUS_OPTIONS are changed, all related functions that use status values (like getStatusBadgeColor) must also be updated to match. Currently AGENTS.md documents the new status options but doesn't specify this dependency.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature blok-ui-list-update: getStatusBadgeColor was not updated when STATUS_OPTIONS changed. Feature blok-database-schema-update: STATUS_OPTIONS changed but no warning about dependent functions.

rejectedObservations.observation: Blok interface uses camelCase for returned object's bulan_tanam and status_tanaman properties but database uses snake_case
rejectedObservations.reason: This is intentional mapping handled correctly in implementation - not a bug or confusion point

rejectedObservations.observation: sph field uses type='text' input instead of type='number'
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a reasonable design choice consistent with how luas field is handled in the same form - not an issue

rejectedObservations.observation: status_tanaman uses radio buttons instead of select dropdown
rejectedObservations.reason: Radio buttons provide equivalent functionality to select - not a deviation from requirements
